ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Deep learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, dice coefficient, loss, recall) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch or iteration number */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number within the epoch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch or iteration number */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number within the epoch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "update_name" TEXT /* Name of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_history_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch or iteration number */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number within the epoch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_compare" (
  "compare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "experiment_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first experiment */,
  "experiment_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second experiment */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value1" REAL /* Value of the metric for the first experiment */,
  "value2" REAL /* Value of the metric for the second experiment */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., better, worse, similar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_compare_experiment_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id1") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_compare_experiment_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id2") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
